targets.rawSql: select value_numeric from evaluation_results where metric = 'true_e2e_user_latency_ms' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by time desc limit 1
select value_numeric from evaluation_results where metric = 'team4_subscribe_latency_ms' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by time desc limit 1
select value_numeric from evaluation_results where metric = 'team4_render_latency_ms' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by time desc limit 1
select coalesce((select value_numeric from evaluation_results where metric = 'team4_missed_alerts' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by time desc limit 1), 0) as value
select coalesce((select value_numeric from evaluation_results where metric = 'team4_duplicate_alerts' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by time desc limit 1), 0) as value

select time, value_numeric as value, metric from evaluation_results where metric in ('team4_receive_latency_ms','team4_queue_latency_ms','team4_subscribe_latency_ms','team4_render_latency_ms','true_e2e_user_latency_ms') and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by time

select event_time as team4_received_at, alert_id, patient_id, trace_id, metadata->>'alert_type' as alert_type from perf_trace_events where component = 'team4' and stage like 'team4%received' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') order by event_time desc limit 1

with per_alert as (select coalesce(alert_id, trace_id, message_id) as alert_key, max(alert_id) as alert_id, max(patient_id) as patient_id, min(abnormal_event_time) filter (where abnormal_event_time is not null) as abnormal_event_time, min(event_time) filter (where component = 'team3' and stage = 'alert_published') as alert_published_at, min(event_time) filter (where component = 'team3' and stage = 'alert_inserted') as alert_inserted_at, min(event_time) filter (where component = 'team4' and stage like 'team4%received') as team4_received_at, min(event_time) filter (where component = 'team4' and stage = 'team4_rendered') as team4_rendered_at from perf_trace_events where ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by coalesce(alert_id, trace_id, message_id)) select alert_id, patient_id, abnormal_event_time, team4_received_at, round((extract(epoch from team4_received_at - abnormal_event_time) * 1000)::numeric, 2) as team4_receive_latency_ms, round((extract(epoch from team4_received_at - alert_inserted_at) * 1000)::numeric, 2) as team4_subscribe_latency_ms, round((extract(epoch from team4_rendered_at - team4_received_at) * 1000)::numeric, 2) as team4_render_latency_ms from per_alert where team4_received_at is not null order by team4_receive_latency_ms desc nulls last limit 20

list.name: run_id
list.query: select 'all' as __text, 'all' as __value union all select run_id as __text, run_id as __value from test_runs order by 1 desc
